description_long: This is a retail package of frozen green garden peas, presented in a rectangular, pillow-shaped plastic bag. The front of the package features a large, vibrant image of green peas in a white bowl, with a predominantly green and white color scheme. The product branding and name are prominently displayed in bold white and green text, with additional information in smaller fonts below. The sides of the bag are crimped and slightly gusseted, giving the package a soft, flexible appearance. The back of the package appears to mirror the front design, with similar graphics and text. The overall look is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a grocery or urban retail setting.
description: A pillow-shaped plastic bag of frozen green garden peas with bold green and white branding and a photo of peas in a bowl. The package is soft, flexible, and visually appealing for retail display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main branding, product name, and a large image of green peas in a bowl.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and crimped edges of the flexible plastic bag.
description_view_2: Back view, similar to the front, with mirrored graphics and text, and the bowl of peas visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness and flexible structure of the bag.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white logo is visible in the upper right corner of the front, featuring stylized text and a small graphic element.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'GREEN GARDEN PEAS' and the image of green peas in a bowl clearly indicate the flavor as plain green peas.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Small text blocks are visible on the front and possibly the back, likely containing nutritional information, but the details are not legible.
